name: industrial-saas-mobile
deprecated: Deprecated 2026-07-06 — superseded by the PWA at /m in the web app (web/src/app/m). See mobile/DEPRECATED.md. Not maintained; not built by CI.
description: DEPRECATED Expo alert client — replaced by the PWA at /m (web/src/app/m). See DEPRECATED.md.

scripts.predeprecation-notice: echo '⚠️  DEPRECATED: this Expo app is replaced by the PWA at /m (web/src/app/m). See mobile/DEPRECATED.md.'
scripts.build:preview: npm run predeprecation-notice && eas build --profile preview
scripts.build:production: npm run predeprecation-notice && eas build --profile production
